title: Quebec investors, entrepreneurs and self-employed persons - Canada.ca
content:
## Quebec investors, entrepreneurs and self-employed persons
The immigration programs for Quebec business class are intended for investors, entrepreneurs, and self employed workers who want to:
- settle in Quebec, and
- support or acquire businesses in Quebec
You need to apply to the Quebec government and get a Certificat de selection du Québec before you apply for permanent residence.
